AI you can defend
to your regulator.
99.99%
Usage rule. Lime carries the eye-magnet moments — headline emphasis, primary CTA, stat numerals, section rules. Pairs only with navy text for legibility — never white-on-lime. One lime moment per surface; if you want to add a second, you're decorating.
